archetype_description: Comfortable with the current situation. Change feels risky.
data_note: Only 0 entries with this archetype assigned. Profiler has not run on most entries — scores will improve as Lead Psychology Profiler processes more leads.

meeting_guidance.opening_approach: Don't challenge their current situation directly. Explore what's imperfect about it.
meeting_guidance.what_to_lead_with: Questions, not pitches: 'What would need to change for you to consider STL?' Find their own reason for change.
meeting_guidance.what_to_avoid: Pressure. Status-quo-resistant leads disengage when they feel pushed.
meeting_guidance.close_approach: Small first steps. 'The agreement is a 6-month trial — if it doesn't work, we exit cleanly.'
meeting_guidance.offer_framing: Frame offer as a low-risk trial rather than a commitment.

delay_signal_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
green_light_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
